name: Linguine a La Greque
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, cook the frozen chopped spinach according to the package directions.
2. Add the canned chick-peas and raisins; stir and cook until heated through.
3. In a large pot of rapidly boiling water, cook the linguine 8 to 10 minutes or until al dente. Drain well.
4. In a large bowl, combine the spinach mixture with the cooked pasta.
5. Sprinkle with salt and red pepper flakes.
6. Drizzle with olive oil and toss to combine.
Serves: four
Calories per serving: 308
